name: Teriyaki Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Place meat in a large shallow glass baking dish.
2. Combine soy sauce, white wine, and sugar in a bowl, then pour over the meat.
3. Arrange the grated ginger, minced garlic, and sliced onion on top of the meat.
4. Cover the dish and refrigerate for 24 hours, turning once.
5. Before serving, bring the meat to room temperature. Broil over hot coals for 4-5 minutes per side.
6. Slice the steak across the width against the grain into thin strips for serving.
You may substitute powdered spices with fresh herbs in the same amounts. Just mix them into the sauce before pouring it over the meat.
